top3.sql:
SELECT d.A2 AS district_name
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'C'  -- Assuming 'C' means finished with no problems (check actual status codes if needed)
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'A'  -- Assuming 'A' means finished with no problems
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
